staff_notes.author: Knight Taylor
staff_notes.message: we agreed upon a wedding on january 2nd with 15-20 guests visiting for the ceremony and reception. $1500 event fee, $1500 Zelle deposit, insurance purchase required. upon arriving, we messaged the guests because several men were smoking on the front porch and we told them that was a violation. guest replied to that saying that they would no longer be holding the event at SON due to them not being satisfied with the parking situation. she also complained that the floors were dirty, the stove didn't work (some burners just needed to be adjusted), and there were cobwebs. she said she would send photos and she never did. we told her GK, LK, and David were all out there. she then wanted the event fee. they ended up having the wedding at a local barn on the 3rd, and had 9-10 cars at SON on both the 2nd and the 3rd.

staff_response: we agreed upon a wedding on january 2nd with 15-20 guests visiting for the ceremony and reception. $1500 event fee, $1500 Zelle deposit, insurance purchase required. upon arriving, we messaged the guests because several men were smoking on the front porch and we told them that was a violation. guest replied to that saying that they would no longer be holding the event at SON due to them not being satisfied with the parking situation. she also complained that the floors were dirty, the stove didn't work (some burners just needed to be adjusted), and there were cobwebs. she said she would send photos and she never did. we told her GK, LK, and David were all out there. she then wanted the event fee. they ended up having the wedding at a local barn on the 3rd, and had 9-10 cars at SON on both the 2nd and the 3rd.

staff_notes.author: Knight Taylor
staff_notes.message: holding all of security deposit due to her response

staff_notes.author: Knight Taylor
staff_notes.message:
her response went to spam: That’s fine, but I don’t believe that it was excessive.  The dogs only stayed on one floor and were never in the basement.  If a few pieces of hair were discovered on the couch, then it must have been by transfer, but we never even stayed on the couch downstairs because we could never get the television to work or sign on to the wi-fi.  We paid an excessive amount of money for the cabin, much more than we have ever paid at much nicer homes.  The upstairs room to the right was absolutely freezing and my child could not sleep the entire time and left early due to how cold that room was.  The television on the main floor was a pain in the neck, the furniture outside was filthy and covered with bugs.  The cabin lacked basic serving plates, etc for a family meal.  The lighting in the rooms plus the outside lighting was abysmal.  None of the bathrooms provided common soap, shampoo, or conditioner and in fact the downstairs bathroom had a tube of body wash that was half used.    $500 for cleaning one blanket and one comforter plus minimal doghair downstairs is outrageous.  The hair was on one floor.  I was not planning on writing a review, but I think I will now. 
Thank you,
Stephanie
 
Stephanie Dobson Webster
General Counsel
Florida Police Benevolent Association

guest_message:
Service Fee: 240.00
Hello! I've been searching high and low for the perfect spot and I think I've found it! My mother in law has had a health battle recently and she is finally ready for a little getaway. We will be celebrating a little late, but their 53rd anniversary and our 2nd. As well as her and mine birthdays. Can't wait to sit on the porch and drink coffee and enjoy that view and company with each other!! Thank you.

staff_notes.author: Knight Taylor
staff_notes.message: Guests rejected the original cabin they booked for personal reasons. We promptly offered to upgrade them with two other options of cabin rentals. Guest decided to cancel the reservation and acknowledged that they would quote "eat it" - i.e. forfeit the reservation cost.

staff_notes.author: Knight Taylor
staff_notes.message: guest texted rue at 10am this morning saying they were in town already and wanted the code. told her via GK the best we could do was 1pm. they then called and were upset about the driveway and refused to stay there. GK let them drive by SON and they said it was too far out. GK offered them FTL and they spoke to him and said they wanted to cancel and get a refund. GK told them we could not refund them, guests said they would eat the money. GK spoke to VRBO in advance about this and they said that as long as we offered them an alternative property we did our part and they would remove a negative review if it came to that.

staff_notes.author: Knight Taylor
staff_notes.message: Guest called and wants gas fireplaces turned on
